project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces - 9 apps, 12 packages, multiple services
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + turbo, workspaces: apps/*, packages/*, services/*
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true, environment:node. Tests in __tests__/ dirs co-located with source. Pattern: describe/it/expect/vi.fn()
verification_instructions: 1) Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run to run all tests. 2) Confirm new test files pass. 3) No TypeScript errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root (workspaces auto-install). Add deps with pnpm --filter <pkg> add <dep>.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from npm. Node 22+. Use node:crypto for all cryptographic operations. openpgp available from npm.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict, no 'any'. Zod validation where applicable. Use crypto.randomBytes/generateKeyPairSync, not Math.random. Co-located .test.ts for every module.
key_patterns: Tests in src/__tests__/ using vitest (describe/it/expect). Crypto utils in packages/auth/src/crypto/. Services are classes. Existing encryption.service.ts in quantchat uses node:crypto with HMAC-based key derivation. PGP service in quantmail uses AES-256-GCM. Root vitest.config.ts runs all test files. Each package has its own vitest.config.ts.
directory_structure: packages/auth/src/ has: crypto/, middleware/, providers/, services/, __tests__/, index.ts, types.ts. apps/quantchat/backend/ has services/ and __tests__/. apps/quantmail/backend/ has services/ and __tests__/.
